channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: 2 US troops dead, one missing after Iran attacks Jordan base
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- 2 US service members die in Iranian attack on Jordan base, 1 missing
- US says two military personnel killed by Iranian attack in Jordan
- Iranian strikes kill 2 U.S. service members in Jordan
- Iran attack in Jordan leaves 2 US troops dead, 1 missing
- Two US troops killed in Jordan by Iranian attacks, US military says
- Two US troops killed, another missing in Jordan attack as Iran warns Washington of 'heavier costs'
- US military says two service members killed in Iranian strike in Jordan
- Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
- 2 US troops dead, one missing after Iran attacks base in Jordan
- Two US service members in Jordan killed in Iranian attack, US says
- Two U.S. Troops Killed In Iranian Attack On Jordan, One Missing
- 2 US Troops Killed, Another Missing in Iranian Strikes on Jordan
- Two U.S. Troops Killed, One Missing in Iran Missile Attack on Jordan
- Two US service members in Jordan killed in Iranian attack, US says
- 2 US troops dead, 1 missing after Iran attacks base in Jordan
- Two US service members killed, one missing in action after Iran strikes base in Jordan
- 2 US Troops Killed, Another Missing After Iranian Strikes on Jordan]]>

- Donald Trump blames Canada for wildfire smoke, says he will add cost to tariffs
- Trump threatens new tariffs on Canada over wildfire smoke affecting US cities
- Trump threatens to increase Canada tariffs over wildfire smoke pollution
- Trump threatens Canada tariffs over wildfire smoke]]>
